## What this changes

One or two lines.

## Checklist

- [ ] The test suite and gates pass (see `.github/workflows/ci.yml`)
- [ ] `python scripts/check_docs.py` is green
- [ ] `python -m deslop README.md` is clean if I touched the README
- [ ] A new rule ships with an example and a test
- [ ] Plain prose: no em-dashes, no marketing words
